mapper.select:
-- SELECT -- a.id AS id, -- a.tag_name, -- COUNT(c.id) AS count -- FROM -- vehicle_function_one_tag a -- LEFT JOIN -- vehicle_function_two_tag b ON a.id = b.function_one_tag_id -- LEFT JOIN -- vehicle_function_three_tag c ON b.id = c.function_two_tag_id -- GROUP BY -- a.id;
SELECT a.id one_id,
a.tag_name_en one_tag_name, c.tag_name_en three_tag_name,
a.tag_name one_tag_name, c.tag_name three_tag_name,
c.id three_id FROM vehicle_function_one_tag a LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_two_tag b ON a.id = b.function_one_tag_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_three_tag c ON b.id = c.function_two_tag_id where a.id != 456422482807619584

SELECT
z.tag_name_en one_tag_name, a.tag_name_en two_tag_name, b.tag_name_en three_tag_name, CONCAT(e.brand_en,"-",d.vehicle_model) brand_model,
z.tag_name one_tag_name, a.tag_name two_tag_name, b.tag_name three_tag_name, CONCAT(e.brand,"-",d.vehicle_model) brand_model,
z.tag_icon, c.video_number, c.vehicle_id, d.status, c.video_str srt_url from vehicle_function_one_tag z left join vehicle_function_two_tag a on z.id = a.function_one_tag_id left join vehicle_function_three_tag b on a.id = b.function_two_tag_id left JOIN vehicle_function_tree c on b.id=c.function_three_tag_id left JOIN vehicle_base_info d on c.vehicle_id = d.id left join vehicle_brand e on d.brand_id = e.id where c.function_list = 1 and c.video_number is not null and c.video_number != "" and c.id not in (465441854398136324,465441854398136322,465441854398136320)

select
z.tag_name_en one_tag_name, a.tag_name_en two_tag_name, b.tag_name_en three_tag_name,
z.tag_name one_tag_name, a.tag_name two_tag_name, b.tag_name three_tag_name,
b.id three_id FROM vehicle_function_one_tag z left join vehicle_function_two_tag a on z.id = a.function_one_tag_id left join vehicle_function_three_tag b on a.id = b.function_two_tag_id where z.`status`=1

select
b.description_en description, c.function_label_en function_label,
b.description, c.function_label,
c.picture_number, c.video_number, c.video_str from vehicle_function_tree c left join vehicle_function_three_tag b on c.function_three_tag_id =b.id where c.vehicle_id=${vehicleId} and b.id =${threeTagId}

SELECT a.id one_tag_id, a.tag_number one_tag_number, a.tag_name one_tag_name, b.id two_tag_id, b.tag_number two_tag_number, b.tag_name two_tag_name, c.id three_tag_id, c.tag_number three_tag_number, c.tag_name three_tag_name FROM vehicle_function_one_tag a, vehicle_function_two_tag b, vehicle_function_three_tag c WHERE a.id = b.function_one_tag_id AND b.id = c.function_two_tag_id
